name: fastapi
description: Reusable FastAPI engineering toolkit — Pydantic v2 schema design, async routing & dependency injection, SQLAlchemy/SQLModel ORM (sync & async sessions, N+1), Alembic migration safety (zero-downtime expand-contract), pydantic-settings/12-factor config, security auditing (OAuth2/JWT, CORS, injection), pytest + httpx testing, and async-correctness/performance. 8 auto-activating skills + 4 commands + 3 agents + session/event-loop/destructive-command guards. Generic and adapter-driven — app layout, ORM, async-vs-sync, and test runner are project-supplied inputs.
